days Peru said last goodbye exceptional woman, some have called "Mother Peruvian Cuisine".
Teresa most respected loved figures gastronomy, leaves fond memories lingering smile luscious food, many great recipes that will keep alive kitchens generations come.
Despite humble origins, Teresa always ambition something big.
mother, sought after cook rich houses Lima, taught cook tender age, with recipes inherited from grandmother.
test came when sick, Teresa, only took charge kitchen with fearlessness determination.
When told this story still remembered exactly what cook that day: rice lentils, roast beef with salad, soup, lemon pie.
meal success, imagine, discovered calling.
Many years later already mother herself, decided open restaurant that made famous: Rincón Conoces (The corner know).
Interesting name restaurant, think?
popularity instant, persevered, always keeping quality colonial desserts traditional food cooked clay pots, soon word about this little culinary spread over city.
Politicians, businessmen, artists journalists, were among loyal clients over years.
gained presence media too, writing books, being interviewed over place, becoming household name.
Even Rachel Ray, from Food Network, visited Teresa restaurant interviewed shows.
used found celebrity promote ingredients that weren well known accepted some parts country, such guinea pig, which eaten almost daily villagers Andes, still tabu great part population.
walls Rincón covered with pictures famous people luck cooking.
place even named national heritage, honor that many eateries brag about.
have very tender memories Teresa, always loving welcoming, greeting people with warmest smiles, like mother does kids.
would time talk clients make them things, charming them with both food loving personality.
What hated most, told when food left plate.
When dish returned clean kitchen, excitement made want clap gourmands.
turned out, mother worked cook then husband aunt, familiarity with which treated even greater.
were seated terrace second floor restaurant, brought lots dishes try.
delighted with savoriness Tacu Tacu, prepared with canary beans, pancetta rice; beans with Escabeche sauce another dish that caught attention.
Escabeche sauce spicy with nice kick vinegar, that combined perfectly with creamy beans.
Arroz Pato another many specialties.
used serve duck boned, rice perfectly cooked, fluffy dente enough that could count every grain, same time soaked cilantro sauce which made juicy bursting with flavor.
final touch, Teresa sent Frejol Colado, sweet concoction with soft texture similar dulce leche, that made black beans doesn resemble their taste all.
very recipe from African origins which beans cooked, then peeled cooked again with anise seeds, cloves, sprinkled with sesame seeds very end.
real treat have sweet tooth, which
what enjoyed most from this wonderful homey preparations, sweet made fruit called Nispero acidic fruit from Latin America).
loved cause tasted just like sweet grandmother used make Salvador when little girl.
like having flashback from family childhood, which completely rounded experience spending afternoon Teresa world.
will share some recipes inspired cooking very soon, meet through food.
will never forgotten.

Fortunately, security sleuths ESET were able clock nasty being served from statcounter.com, reported caper.Both StatCounter Gate.io took measures shut down attack soon thereafter.
Gate.io said that coins were actually stolen.
attack possible?
StatCounter told Register that, rather than servers being directly compromised sling Gate.io, miscreants poisoned tracking scripts served content distribution network, Cloudflare.
This resulted websites embedding StatCounter code pull booby-trapped script from Cloudflare.
What normally happens this: website sets Cloudflare cache that when visitors site, they fetch from Cloudflare cache instead.
This relieves pressure website's servers, makes Cloudflare take load.
order work, cache reach site's servers copies pages when they first requested visitors, keeps copy these files serve subsequent requests.
It's possible craft requests cache such that malicious files fetched from another server, legit website server, stored cache that subsequent requests from visitors fetch poisoned files from cache.
This possible using techniques like changing X-Forwarded-Host header HTTP(S) request pull into cache infected file from evil server.
Cloudflare been warning this attack vector months, apparently StatCounter properly configured their servers settings keep attacker from taking advantage this weakness.
"Following suspicious activity, have stopped using StatCounter's services," Gate.io told Register
user funds have been removed have seen irregularities platform."
Cloudflare, meanwhile, kept statement matter brief.
comment customer configurations," spokesperson tells
have evidence compromise infrastructure."
there have potentially catastrophic financial attack appears have largely been averted and, aside from some lost business StatCounter, important lesson learned with relatively little pain.
